data.title: Energean awards 2026 long-term incentive shares to senior leadership
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Energean ( (GB:ENOG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Energean has granted a series of conditional share awards to senior executives under its 2026 Long-Term Incentive Plan, including CEO Mathios Rigas, CFO Panos Benos and regional and functional heads. The awards, over ordinary shares with no upfront cost, are subject to a performance period running until 31 December 2028 and, for certain executives, an additional two-year holding requirement.

The plan also entitles recipients to receive dividend equivalents in shares on any future dividends declared before the awards are released, reinforcing the link between management rewards and shareholder returns. The grants underscore Energean’s continued use of equity-based compensation to incentivise long-term value creation and retain key leadership across its core business units.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ENOG) stock is a Hold with a £892.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Energean stock, see the GB:ENOG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ENOG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ENOG is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by elevated balance-sheet risk (thin equity cushion and rising debt) and the 2025 net loss despite strong operating cash flow. Valuation is a key offset with a low P/E and high dividend yield, while technical indicators are moderately supportive but not decisively bullish.

To see Spark’s full report on ENOG stock, click here.

More about Energean

Energean plc is an energy company focused on the exploration and production of hydrocarbons, with operations including its Israeli and international subsidiaries. The group is listed in London and uses equity-based long-term incentive schemes to align senior management and key staff with shareholder interests and long-term performance goals.

data.title: American Pacific Closes Tuscarora Sale to ICG as Nevada Assets Spin Out
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from American Pacific Mining ( (TSE:USGD) ) is now available.

American Pacific Mining and ICG Silver & Gold have closed a plan of arrangement under which American Pacific sold 100% of its Tuscarora and Danny Boy silver-gold projects in Nevada to ICG. The transaction is structured through the sale of two American Pacific subsidiaries in exchange for 11.5 million ICG shares, a contingent US$5 million production payment, and a pro-rata distribution of 7.5 million ICG shares to American Pacific shareholders.

ICG has secured conditional Canadian Securities Exchange approval, with its shares, including those distributed to American Pacific investors, expected to begin trading on March 31 under the ticker ICG. The deal allows ICG to advance the Tuscarora District with fresh capital from a $2.8 million financing while American Pacific retains equity exposure to the asset and refocuses on its Madison Copper-Gold Project in Montana, potentially sharpening its strategic positioning in the North American metals sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:USGD) stock is a Hold with a C$0.22 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Pacific Mining stock, see the TSE:USGD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on USGD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, USGD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing cash burn, and poor earnings quality despite recent positive net income). Technicals provide some support with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, but valuation remains a headwind due to a high P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on USGD stock, click here.

More about American Pacific Mining

American Pacific Mining Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on precious and base metals, with key assets in North American mining jurisdictions. Its portfolio includes the flagship Madison Copper-Gold Project in Montana, while it has also advanced district-scale silver and gold projects in Nevada through exploration and strategic transactions.

Average Trading Volume: 1,105,193

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$31.77M

data.title: Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 Cuts Share Count in Latest Buy-Back
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 ( (GB:MAV4) ) has shared an announcement.

Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 PLC has executed a share buy-back, repurchasing 1,981,251 of its own ordinary shares at 51.5p per share for cancellation as part of its ongoing capital management strategy. The transaction reduces the company’s issued share capital to 163,306,920 ordinary shares, and the updated voting share figure will serve as the new reference point for shareholders assessing disclosure obligations under FCA transparency rules.

The reduction in the number of shares in issue may enhance net asset value per share over time and signals continued use of buy-backs to provide liquidity and support the secondary market in the VCT’s shares. Shareholders and potential investors now have a clarified denominator for calculating voting rights and determining whether they must notify holdings or changes in holdings to the market under regulatory requirements.

More about Maven Income and Growth VCT 4

Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust that provides investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of smaller, growth-oriented private and AIM-quoted companies. It is managed by Maven Capital Partners UK LLP and focuses on delivering income and capital returns under the UK VCT regime.

Average Trading Volume: 9,722

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Learn more about MAV4 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Marvel Biosciences Taps Novotech to Run Phase I Trial of Lead Neurodrug MB-204
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Marvel Biosciences Corp ( (TSE:MRVL) ) has issued an update.

Marvel Biosciences has appointed Australian firm Novotech as the contract research organization for the Phase I clinical trial of its lead drug candidate MB-204, a neuroactive adenosine A2A antagonist for neurodevelopmental disorders. Leveraging Australia’s favorable regulatory environment and substantial R&D tax incentives, the company aims to accelerate first-in-human studies while optimizing costs.

The partnership with Novotech, an award-winning global biotech CRO, marks a key inflection point as MB-204 moves into human trials after completing cGMP synthesis and 4-week GLP toxicology studies. The move underscores Marvel’s confidence in MB-204’s potential to create value in underserved indications such as Rett syndrome, Fragile X, and broader autism spectrum and mood disorders, potentially strengthening its position in the neurotherapeutics market.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MRVL) stock is a Hold with a C$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Marvel Biosciences Corp stock, see the TSE:MRVL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MRVL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MRVL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses/cash burn, negative equity and rising debt). Technicals are only modestly positive in the near term but still weak longer term, while valuation is hard to support given losses and no dividend. Corporate events are a relative bright spot, with patents and non-dilutive support improving the pipeline/IP outlook, but they do not offset the current financial risk.

To see Spark’s full report on MRVL stock, click here.

More about Marvel Biosciences Corp

Marvel Biosciences Corp., through its wholly owned subsidiary Marvel Biotechnology Inc., is a Calgary-based biotechnology company focused on developing novel therapeutics for neurological diseases and neurodevelopmental disorders. Its lead candidate, MB-204, is a patented fluorinated derivative of Parkinson’s drug Istradefylline, targeting the adenosine A2A receptor for conditions such as autism spectrum disorder, depression, Alzheimer’s disease, Rett syndrome, and Fragile X syndrome.

Average Trading Volume: 65,307

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$8.41M

For an in-depth examination of MRVL stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:

The latest update is out from Bessor Minerals Inc ( (TSE:BST) ).

Bessor Minerals Inc. has terminated its asset purchase agreement to acquire the Jagrite Graphite Project near Bella Coola, British Columbia, ending a proposed expansion into graphite exploration. The move signals a renewed concentration on the company’s core exploration assets at Golden Eagle in the Yukon and Redhill in British Columbia, along with its existing royalty interest in Artemis Gold’s Blackwater Mine, which may streamline capital allocation and operational focus for stakeholders.

More about Bessor Minerals Inc

Bessor Minerals Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing its Golden Eagle property in the Yukon and the Redhill volcanogenic massive sulphide deposit in British Columbia. The company also holds a 1% net smelter return royalty on certain claims within the Blackwater Mine operated by Artemis Gold Inc., providing additional exposure to precious metals production.

data.title: Sydbank Adjusts 2026 Interim Report Date and Confirms Financial Calendar
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sydbank A/S ( (GB:0MGE) ) has provided an announcement.

Sydbank A/S has issued a correction to its 2026 financial calendar, shifting the release date of its interim report for the first three quarters of 2026 from 4 November to 5 November. The bank has also confirmed the timing for all its preliminary financial announcements in 2026, stating that interim reports for Q1, the first half and Q1–Q3 will be published at 8:00 a.m. on 6 May, 26 August and 5 November, respectively, and made available on its Danish and international websites.

The clarified reporting schedule offers investors and other stakeholders greater visibility on when to expect key financial disclosures, supporting transparency and planning around Sydbank’s performance updates. The minor calendar adjustment underscores the bank’s attention to precise communication of its financial timetable, which is important for analysts and market participants who track its results closely.

More about Sydbank A/S

Sydbank A/S is a Danish banking group headquartered in Aabenraa, providing a range of financial services to retail and corporate customers. The bank operates primarily in Denmark and focuses on traditional banking products such as lending, deposits and related financial solutions.

Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6938) ) has issued an update.

Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd., a Hong Kong-listed Chinese life sciences company, plans to deepen employee and partner alignment with shareholder interests through equity-based incentives linked to its H shares. The group’s focus on life science innovation positions it to use share-based rewards to attract and retain talent and strategic service providers in a competitive biotech market.

The board has resolved to propose the adoption of an H share option scheme and an H share incentive scheme, both involving the issue of new H shares and designed to grant equity to employees, service providers and related entities. Implementation of these schemes is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming annual general meeting and listing approval for the new shares, with the company warning investors to exercise caution while the proposals remain pending.

data.title: Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Proposes 2025 Final Dividend With Currency Option and Tax Guidance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co ( (HK:3618) ) has issued an update.

Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank has proposed a final ordinary dividend of RMB 1.1755 per 10 shares for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, with H-share holders able to receive payment in Hong Kong dollars or renminbi, subject to a later announcement on the HKD amount and key timetable details. The bank has also outlined its withholding tax arrangements for different categories of non-resident shareholders, clarifying applicable tax rates and responsibilities, which will be relevant for cross-border investors using the Hong Kong Stock Connect channels and may influence the net yield they receive from the payout.

Shareholders of record on 15 June 2026 will be entitled to the dividend, which is scheduled for payment on 27 July 2026, pending formal shareholder approval of the distribution. By maintaining a cash dividend with a currency option and providing detailed tax guidance, the bank underscores its intention to offer predictable returns and transparency to its international investor base amid ongoing regulatory and tax considerations for Chinese financial institutions listed in Hong Kong.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3618) stock is a Buy with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co stock, see the HK:3618 Stock Forecast page.

More about Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co

Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. is a mainland Chinese commercial bank listed in Hong Kong, serving retail and corporate customers with a focus on rural and regional financial services. Its H shares are traded under stock code 03618, attracting both domestic and international investors through the Hong Kong market.

data.title: Advanced Gold forms U.S. unit and launches NI 43-101 program at Nevada’s Silver Belle project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Advance United Holdings ( (TSE:AUEX) ) is now available.

Advanced Gold Exploration Inc. is expanding its footprint into the U.S. by creating a wholly owned subsidiary, to be called Silver Belle Resources LLC or a similar name, to manage recently acquired claims in Eureka County, Nevada. The move builds on the company’s strategy of leveraging historically worked properties and complements its Canadian gold and copper portfolio.

The company has mandated Arizona-based geological consultancy ProDeMin USA LLC, led by Dr. Craig Gibson, to run a Phase 1 exploration program and produce an NI 43-101 technical report on the Silver Belle Project. The work, set to begin in mid-to-late April 2026, will include detailed mapping, systematic sampling, advanced field technology and data integration, aiming to modernize historic data, validate high-grade carbonate replacement deposit potential and lay a compliant technical foundation that could position Silver Belle as a significant CRD-style silver and base-metal project in one of Nevada’s most productive mineral belts.

Historical smelter returns from 1937 indicate exceptionally high silver grades and significant lead, zinc, copper and antimony content at Silver Belle, reinforcing its potential within an antimony-enriched segment of the regional CRD belt. The technical report, expected about two months after the program starts, will guide future drilling and resource-definition decisions, potentially reshaping Advanced Gold’s growth profile and exposure to U.S. high-grade polymetallic exploration.

More about Advance United Holdings

Advanced Gold Exploration Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold and copper properties, primarily in Canada. The company specializes in identifying and acquiring undervalued projects with significant historical work, aiming to enhance their economic value and deliver both immediate and long-term returns to partners and shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 23,228

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.88M

See more insights into AUEX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
